Center: Center of Nuclear Physics Data, Russian Federal Nuclear Center (VNIIEF), Sarov, Russia
ref: Jour: Bull.Russian Academy of Sciences - Physics, Vol.31, p.174 (1968)
title: Elastic and inelastic scattering of protons on Sm-148, Sm-154, and Yb-174

x4freetext: Elastic and inelastic scattering of protons on Sm-148,
Sm-154, and Yb-174

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Bull.Russian Academy of Sciences - Physics, Vol.31, p.174 (1968)

x4freetext: English translation

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Izv. Rossiiskoi Akademii Nauk, Ser.Fiz., Vol.31, p.195 (1967)

x4freetext: The telescopic system consisting of two
dE/dx counters and one E surface barrier silicon
counter was used.
Free film was used as a target.
An error of elastic scattering cross
section at the angles more than 30 degr. was 2-3% and
at the angle of 20 degr. it was 5%. Accuracy of peak
separation, elastic scattering background, statistics,
and in some cases contribution of impurities were
taken into account. Only in some cases the errors
exceed 10%. Inelastic cross section measurements
were characterized by smaller errors (2-4%) due to
the less contribution of elastic scattering.
An error of the absolute normalization
SD: Corrections in all Subents.
